entries.definition:
ḥ–l–q–m throat, gullet, windpipe; extreme ends, dates ripe at
one end. Of this root, حُلْقُوم ḥulqūm occurs once in the Qurʾan.

حُلْقُوم ḥulqūm [n.] throat, gullet, windpipe (56:83) فَلَوْلَا إِذَا بَلَغَتِ
الحُلْقُومَ if only when it [the soul of a dying person] comes up to his
throat.
